name: the cloud refresh workflow pushes refreshed rules to a review branch and opens a pull request never committing the official ruleset to main directly
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'w = YAML.safe_load(File.read(ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"] + "/.github/workflows/standards-refresh-cloud.yml"), aliases: true); runs = w["jobs"]["refresh"]["steps"].map { |s| s["run"].to_s }.join("\n"); ok = runs.include?("BRANCH=\"standards-refresh/") && runs.include?("gh pr create --base main") && !runs.include?("git push origin main") && w["jobs"]["refresh"]["steps"].none? { |s| s["run"].to_s.match(/push.*refs\/heads\/main/) }; STDERR.puts "cloud-refresh-stays-pr-gated" if ok; exit(ok ? 0 : 1)'
